---
title: "Population denominator sensitivity analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
source("../R/functions.R")
```

This Quarto file can be used as an exploratory analysis report after running the numbered scripts.

```{r}
if (file.exists("../output/tables/population_reference_summary.csv")) {
  readr::read_csv("../output/tables/population_reference_summary.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |> head()
}
```

```{r}
if (file.exists("../output/tables/rate_reference_summary.csv")) {
  readr::read_csv("../output/tables/rate_reference_summary.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |> head()
}
```
